motion_magnitude.description: Magnitude of hand motion during gesture

thumb_index_distance.description: Distance between thumb and index finger

rules.description: IF motion_magnitude IS high AND gesture_duration IS normal THEN fuzzy_confidence IS high
conditions: gesture_duration IS normal THEN fuzzy_confidence IS high

rules.description: IF hand_size IS small AND thumb_index_distance IS close THEN fuzzy_confidence IS high
conditions: thumb_index_distance IS close THEN fuzzy_confidence IS high

rules.description: IF temporal_consistency IS high THEN fuzzy_confidence IS high
IF motion_magnitude IS medium AND temporal_consistency IS medium THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium
conditions: temporal_consistency IS medium THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium

rules.description: IF hand_size IS medium AND thumb_index_distance IS medium THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium
conditions: thumb_index_distance IS medium THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium

rules.description: IF gesture_duration IS normal AND temporal_consistency IS medium THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium
conditions: temporal_consistency IS medium THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium

rules.description: IF motion_magnitude IS low AND gesture_duration IS short THEN fuzzy_confidence IS low
conditions: gesture_duration IS short THEN fuzzy_confidence IS low

rules.description: IF temporal_consistency IS low THEN fuzzy_confidence IS low
IF thumb_index_distance IS far AND hand_size IS large THEN fuzzy_confidence IS low
conditions: hand_size IS large THEN fuzzy_confidence IS low

rules.description: IF motion_magnitude IS high AND temporal_consistency IS low THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium
conditions: temporal_consistency IS low THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium

rules.description: IF hand_size IS small AND gesture_duration IS short THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium
conditions: gesture_duration IS short THEN fuzzy_confidence IS medium
